positioning: AI Automation. Meta Ads. Custom Websites. One agency built to grow your business.

services.name: AI Assistants
services.description: Custom AI for 24/7 lead qualification and booking

signals: Uses 'you/your' frequently in CTAs and body copy
Benefit-led language ('Make your life easier'), avoids jargon
Direct CTAs ('Book a Free Call', 'Get in Touch')

colors.notes: Dark-mode aesthetic inferred from transparent-white logo and modern SaaS agency styling; exact hex values not extractable from rendered HTML

typography.pairing_descriptor: Modern sans-serif SaaS agency styling (specific fonts not detectable from WebFetch; likely Inter, Poppins, or Manrope based on industry conventions)

imagery.style: mixed — product/service visuals with geographic credibility graphics (US map)
imagery.composition: clean, minimal, dark-mode SaaS with clear CTA hierarchy

brand_values: accessibility of AI for small/mid-size businesses

target_audience.profession: Owners/operators of US service businesses (home services, local trades, medspa, fitness, professional services) and e-commerce brands under ~$5M revenue
target_audience.geography: United States — currently active in Texas, South Carolina, South Florida
pain_points: Missing leads after hours / slow response times
Ad spend that doesn't convert to booked calls or sales
Outdated websites that don't capture traffic
Can't afford a full-time marketing team
Overwhelmed by 'AI' hype but unsure how to actually use it
aspirations: Predictable lead flow without manual follow-up
Higher ROAS on existing Meta ad spend
A website that books clients while they sleep
Looking modern and future-ready to prospects

offer_anchors: Free discovery call (primary CTA across site)
Bundled 'one agency' positioning vs. hiring 3 vendors
competitive_angle: Bundled AI + Meta Ads + Website as one agency vs. clients stitching together separate vendors; positioned as the 'accept the future' modern alternative to traditional marketing agencies
notes: Brand profile built from homepage content extraction. Exact color hexes and Google Font identifiers not recoverable via text-only WebFetch; would require Playwright screenshot + CSS scrape for full visual fidelity. Confidence: medium on voice, low on exact visual identity, high on services/positioning.
